overview: DK Gold is a professional gold buying and pledged gold release service. The website showcases the company's services — buying gold at market rates and providing instant cash — with a prominent call-to-action to contact the business.
features: Hero section with company branding and instant cash tagline
Services overview for gold buying and pledged gold release
Trust indicators showing fair market pricing and fast payouts
Prominent Call Us Now button as primary CTA
How it works section with simple steps
